title: Locator-Bar Remover
body:
![Slogan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f4fbaa3f65382d46e9a6e9182cfc76374b15ab9.png) ## 📸 Preview | With LocatorBarRemover | Without LocatorBarRemover | |:---:|:---:| | ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88cf6ed8a17607c16533bcc64e19fb8558dafd8.png) |![No LocatorBarRemover...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618ce26eb5eaa3f63294d266ccaea93be87e6f7a.png)| ## ⚡ Features - 🟢 **Restores the classic XP like in older Minecraft versions - 🪶 **Lightweight** — zero performance impact on your server - 🔌 **Plug & Play** — no configuration needed, just drop it in and go - ♻️ **Always up-to-date** — actively maintained for the latest Paper/Spigot versions --- ## 🛠️ Installation 1. Download the `locatorbarremover-VERSION.jar` file 2. Place it into your server's `/plugins` folder 3. Restart your server 4. Done — the old XP bar is back! ✅ --- ## 🔧 Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Supported | |:-----------------:|:---------:| | 26.1 | ✅ | | 1.21.11 | ✅ | | 1.21.10 | ✅ | | 1.21.9 | ✅ | | 1.21.8 | ✅ | | 1.21.7 | ✅ | | 1.21.6 | ✅ | > **Server Software:** Spigot/PaperMC and Forks --- ## 💬 Support & Feedback Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue on Github — feedback is always welcome! ---
*Made with ❤️ by Larrox*
